ragingbull.descJa: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated. If the user's current form is a Paldean Tauros, this move's type changes to match. Fighting type for Combat Breed, Fire type for Blaze Breed, and Water type for Aqua Breed.

ragingfury.shortDescJa: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
ragingfury.descJa: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.

raindance.shortDescJa: For 5 turns, heavy rain powers Water moves.
raindance.descJa: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Rain Dance. The damage of Water-type attacks is multiplied by 1.5 and the damage of Fire-type attacks is multiplied by 0.5 during the effect. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Damp Rock. Fails if the current weather is Rain Dance.

rapidspin.shortDescJa: Free user from hazards/bind/Leech Seed; +1 Spe.
rapidspin.descJa: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the effects of Leech Seed and binding moves end for the user, and all hazards are removed from the user's side of the field. Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

razorshell.shortDescJa: 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
razorshell.descJa: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

recover.shortDescJa: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
recover.descJa: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.

recycle.shortDescJa: ユーザーが最後に使用したアイテムを復元します。
recycle.descJa: The user regains the item it last used. Fails if the user is holding an item, if the user has not held an item, if the item was a popped Air Balloon, if the item was picked up by a Pokemon with the Pickup Ability, or if the item was lost to Bug Bite, Corrosive Gas, Covet, Incinerate, Knock Off, Pluck, or Thief. Items thrown with Fling can be regained.

reflect.shortDescJa: For 5 turns, physical damage to allies is halved.
reflect.descJa: For 5 turns, the user and its party members take 0.5x damage from physical attacks, or 0.66x damage if in a Double Battle. Damage is not reduced further with Aurora Veil. Critical hits ignore this effect. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Brick Break, Psychic Fangs, or Defog. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Light Clay. Fails if the effect is already active on the user's side.

reflecttype.shortDescJa: User becomes the same type as the target.
reflecttype.descJa: Causes the user's types to become the same as the current types of the target. If the target's current types include typeless and a non-added type, typeless is ignored. If the target's current types include typeless and an added type from Forest's Curse or Trick-or-Treat, typeless is copied as the Normal type instead. Fails if the user is an Arceus or a Silvally, if the user is Terastallized, or if the target's current type is typeless alone.

rest.shortDescJa: User sleeps 2 turns and restores HP and status.
rest.descJa: The user falls asleep for the next two turns and restores all of its HP, curing itself of any non-volatile status condition in the process. Fails if the user has full HP, is already asleep, or if another effect is preventing sleep.

reversal.shortDescJa: More power the less HP the user has left.
reversal.descJa: The power of this move is 20 if X is 33 to 48, 40 if X is 17 to 32, 80 if X is 10 to 16, 100 if X is 5 to 9, 150 if X is 2 to 4, and 200 if X is 0 or 1, where X is equal to (user's current HP * 48 / user's maximum HP), rounded down.

risingvoltage.shortDescJa: 2x power if target is grounded in Electric Terrain.
risingvoltage.descJa: If the current terrain is Electric Terrain and the target is grounded, this move's power is doubled.

roar.shortDescJa: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.
roar.descJa: The target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. Fails if the target is the last unfainted Pokemon in its party, or if the target used Ingrain previously or has the Suction Cups Ability.

rockblast.descJa: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

rockpolish.descJa: Raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.

rockslide.shortDescJa: 30% chance to make the foe(s) flinch.
rockslide.descJa: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

rocktomb.shortDescJa: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
rocktomb.descJa: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

rockwrecker.descJa: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.

roleplay.shortDescJa: User replaces its Ability with the target's.
roleplay.descJa: The user's Ability changes to match the target's Ability. Fails if the user's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, Zero to Hero, or already matches the target, or if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

roost.shortDescJa: Heals 50% HP. Flying-type removed 'til turn ends.
roost.descJa: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up. If the user is not Terastallized, until the end of the turn Flying-type users lose their Flying type and pure Flying-type users become Normal type. Does nothing if the user's HP is full.

round.shortDescJa: Power doubles if others used Round this turn.
round.descJa: If there are other active Pokemon that chose this move for use this turn, those Pokemon take their turn immediately after the user, in Speed order, and this move's power is 120 for each other user.

sacredsword.shortDescJa: Ignores the target's stat stage changes.
sacredsword.descJa: Ignores the target's stat stage changes, including evasiveness.

safeguard.shortDescJa: For 5 turns, protects user's party from status.
safeguard.descJa: For 5 turns, the user and its party members cannot have non-volatile status conditions or confusion inflicted on them by other Pokemon. Pokemon on the user's side cannot become affected by Yawn but can fall asleep from its effect. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Defog. Fails if the effect is already active on the user's side.

saltcure.shortDescJa: Deals 1/16 max HP each turn; 1/8 on Steel, Water.
saltcure.descJa: Causes damage to the target equal to 1/16 of its maximum HP (1/8 if the target is Steel or Water type), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. This effect ends when the target is no longer active.

sandtomb.shortDescJa: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
sandtomb.descJa: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

sandstorm.shortDescJa: For 5 turns, a sandstorm rages. Rock: 1.5x SpD.
sandstorm.descJa: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Sandstorm. At the end of each turn except the last, all active Pokemon lose 1/16 of their maximum HP, rounded down, unless they are a Ground, Rock, or Steel type, or have the Magic Guard, Overcoat, Sand Force, Sand Rush, or Sand Veil Abilities. During the effect, the Special Defense of Rock-type Pokemon is multiplied by 1.5 when taking damage from a special attack. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Smooth Rock. Fails if the current weather is Sandstorm.

scald.shortDescJa: 30% chance to burn the target. Thaws target.
scald.descJa: 30%の確率でターゲットを燃やします。ターゲットが凍っている場合は解凍されます。

scaleshot.shortDescJa: Hits 2-5 times. User: -1 Def, +1 Spe after last hit.
scaleshot.descJa: Hits two to five times. Lowers the user's Defense by 1 stage and raises the user's Speed by 1 stage after the last hit. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

scaryface.descJa: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.

scorchingsands.shortDescJa: 30% chance to burn the target. Thaws target.
scorchingsands.descJa: 30%の確率でターゲットを燃やします。ターゲットが凍っている場合は解凍されます。

screech.descJa: Lowers the target's Defense by 2 stages.

seismictoss.shortDescJa: Does damage equal to the user's level.
seismictoss.descJa: Deals damage to the target equal to the user's level.

selfdestruct.shortDescJa: Hits adjacent Pokemon. The user faints.
selfdestruct.descJa: The user faints after using this move, even if this move fails for having no target. This move is prevented from executing if any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability.

shadowball.shortDescJa: 20% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
shadowball.descJa: Has a 20% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

shadowclaw.descJa: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

shadowpunch.shortDescJa: This move does not check accuracy.
shadowpunch.descJa: This move does not check accuracy.

shadowsneak.shortDescJa: 通常は最初に進みます。

shedtail.shortDescJa: User takes 1/2 its max HP to pass a substitute.
shedtail.descJa: The user takes 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded up, and creates a substitute that has 1/4 of the user's maximum HP, rounded down. The user is replaced with another Pokemon in its party and the selected Pokemon has the substitute transferred to it. Fails if the user would faint, or if there are no unfainted party members.

sheercold.shortDescJa: OHKOs non-Ice targets. Fails if user's lower level.
sheercold.descJa: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + X)%, where X is 30 if the user is an Ice type and 20 otherwise, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Ice-type Pokemon and Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.

shellsidearm.shortDescJa: 20% psn. Physical+contact if it would be stronger.
shellsidearm.descJa: Has a 20% chance to poison the target. This move becomes a physical attack that makes contact if the value of ((((2 * the user's level / 5 + 2) * 90 * X) / Y) / 50), where X is the user's Attack stat and Y is the target's Defense stat, is greater than the same value where X is the user's Special Attack stat and Y is the target's Special Defense stat. No stat modifiers other than stat stage changes are considered for this purpose. If the two values are equal, this move chooses a damage category at random.

shellsmash.shortDescJa: Lowers Def, SpD by 1; raises Atk, SpA, Spe by 2.
shellsmash.descJa: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage. Raises the user's Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by 2 stages.

shelter.descJa: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

simplebeam.descJa: Causes the target's Ability to become Simple. Fails if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Simple, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Truant, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

sing.shortDescJa: Causes the target to fall asleep.
sing.descJa: Causes the target to fall asleep.

skillswap.shortDescJa: The user and the target trade Abilities.
skillswap.descJa: The user swaps its Ability with the target's Ability. Fails if either the user or the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

skittersmack.shortDescJa: 100% chance to lower target's Sp. Atk by 1.
skittersmack.descJa: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.

skyattack.shortDescJa: Charges, then hits turn 2. 30% flinch. High crit.
skyattack.descJa: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch and a higher chance for a critical hit. This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

slackoff.shortDescJa: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
slackoff.descJa: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.

sleeppowder.shortDescJa: Causes the target to fall asleep.
sleeppowder.descJa: Causes the target to fall asleep.

sleeptalk.shortDescJa: User must be asleep. Uses another known move.
sleeptalk.descJa: One of the user's known moves, besides this move, is selected for use at random. Fails if the user is not asleep. The selected move does not have PP deducted from it, and can currently have 0 PP. This move cannot select Assist, Beak Blast, Belch, Bide, Blazing Torque, Celebrate, Chatter, Combat Torque, Copycat, Dynamax Cannon, Focus Punch, Hold Hands, Magical Torque, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Move, Nature Power, Noxious Torque, Shell Trap, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Struggle, Uproar, Wicked Torque, or any two-turn move.

sludgebomb.descJa: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

sludgewave.descJa: 10%の確率でターゲットを毒状態にします。

smackdown.descJa: This move can hit a target using Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, or is under the effect of Sky Drop. If this move hits a target under the effect of Bounce, Fly, Magnet Rise, or Telekinesis, the effect ends. If the target is a Flying type that has not used Roost this turn or a Pokemon with the Levitate Ability, it loses its immunity to Ground-type attacks and the Arena Trap Ability as long as it remains active. During the effect, Magnet Rise fails for the target and Telekinesis fails against the target.

smartstrike.shortDescJa: This move does not check accuracy.
smartstrike.descJa: This move does not check accuracy.

snaptrap.shortDescJa: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
snaptrap.descJa: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

snarl.shortDescJa: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Sp. Atk by 1.
snarl.descJa: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.

snore.shortDescJa: User must be asleep. 30% chance to flinch target.
snore.descJa: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch. Fails if the user is not asleep.

snowscape.shortDescJa: For 5 turns, snow falls. Ice: 1.5x Def.
snowscape.descJa: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Snow. During the effect, the Defense of Ice-type Pokemon is multiplied by 1.5 when taking damage from a physical attack. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Icy Rock. Fails if the current weather is Snow.

soak.shortDescJa: Changes the target's type to Water.
soak.descJa: Causes the target to become a Water type. Fails if the target is an Arceus or a Silvally, if the target is already purely Water type, or if the target is Terastallized.

softboiled.shortDescJa: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
softboiled.descJa: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.

solarbeam.shortDescJa: Charges turn 1. Hits turn 2. No charge in sunlight.
solarbeam.descJa: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Power is halved if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow and the user is not holding Utility Umbrella. If the user is holding a Power Herb or the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move completes in one turn. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move still requires a turn to charge.

solarblade.shortDescJa: Charges turn 1. Hits turn 2. No charge in sunlight.
solarblade.descJa: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Power is halved if the weather is Hail, Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, or Sandstorm and the user is not holding Utility Umbrella. If the user is holding a Power Herb or the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move completes in one turn. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move still requires a turn to charge.

sparklingaria.shortDescJa: The target is cured of its burn.
sparklingaria.descJa: If the user has not fainted, the target is cured of its burn.

speedswap.descJa: The user swaps its Speed stat with the target. Stat stage changes are unaffected.

spicyextract.shortDescJa: Raises target's Atk by 2 and lowers its Def by 2.
spicyextract.descJa: Raises the target's Attack by 2 stages and lowers its Defense by 2 stages.

spikes.shortDescJa: Hurts grounded foes on switch-in. Max 3 layers.
spikes.descJa: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Can be used up to three times before failing. Opponents lose 1/8 of their maximum HP with one layer, 1/6 of their maximum HP with two layers, and 1/4 of their maximum HP with three layers, all rounded down. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

spikyshield.shortDescJa: Protects from moves. Contact: loses 1/8 max HP.
spikyshield.descJa: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn, and Pokemon making contact with the user lose 1/8 of their maximum HP, rounded down. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.

spiritshackle.shortDescJa: ターゲットのスイッチアウトを防ぎます。
spiritshackle.descJa: Prevents the target from switching out. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field.

spitup.shortDescJa: More power with more uses of Stockpile.
spitup.descJa: Power is equal to 100 times the user's Stockpile count. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 0. Whether or not this move is successful, the user's Defense and Special Defense decrease by as many stages as Stockpile had increased them, and the user's Stockpile count resets to 0.

spite.shortDescJa: 対象の最後の技のPPを4減らす。
spite.descJa: Causes the target's last move used to lose 4 PP. Fails if the target has not made a move, if the move has 0 PP, or if it no longer knows the move.

spore.shortDescJa: Causes the target to fall asleep.
spore.descJa: Causes the target to fall asleep.

stealthrock.shortDescJa: Hurts foes on switch-in. Factors Rock weakness.
stealthrock.descJa: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in. Fails if the effect is already active on the opposing side. Foes lose 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, or 1/2 of their maximum HP, rounded down, based on their weakness to the Rock type; 0.25x, 0.5x, neutral, 2x, or 4x, respectively. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

steelbeam.descJa: Whether or not this move is successful and even if it would cause fainting, the user loses 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded up, unless the user has the Magic Guard Ability.

steelroller.shortDescJa: Fails if there is no terrain active. Ends the terrain.
steelroller.descJa: Fails if there is no terrain active. Ends the effects of Electric Terrain, Grassy Terrain, Misty Terrain, and Psychic Terrain.

steelwing.shortDescJa: 10% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1.
steelwing.descJa: Has a 10% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.

stickyweb.shortDescJa: Lowers Speed of grounded foes by 1 on switch-in.
stickyweb.descJa: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, lowering the Speed by 1 stage of each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Fails if the effect is already active on the opposing side. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

stockpile.shortDescJa: Raises user's Defense, Sp. Def by 1. Max 3 uses.
stockpile.descJa: Raises the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage. The user's Stockpile count increases by 1. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 3. The user's Stockpile count is reset to 0 when it is no longer active.

stompingtantrum.shortDescJa: Power doubles if the user's last move failed.
stompingtantrum.descJa: Power doubles if the user's last move on the previous turn, including moves called by other moves or those used through Instruct, Magic Coat, Snatch, or the Dancer or Magic Bounce Abilities, failed to do any of its normal effects, not including damage from an unsuccessful High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, or Mind Blown, or if the user was prevented from moving by any effect other than recharging or Sky Drop. A move that was blocked by Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, Spiky Shield, Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard will not double this move's power, nor will Bounce or Fly ending early due to the effect of Gravity, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.

stoneaxe.shortDescJa: Sets Stealth Rock on the target's side.
stoneaxe.descJa: If this move is successful, it sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in. Foes lose 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, or 1/2 of their maximum HP, rounded down, based on their weakness to the Rock type; 0.25x, 0.5x, neutral, 2x, or 4x, respectively. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

stoneedge.descJa: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

storedpower.shortDescJa: + 20 power for each of the user's stat boosts.
storedpower.descJa: Power is equal to 20+(X*20), where X is the user's total stat stage changes that are greater than 0.

stormthrow.shortDescJa: Always results in a critical hit.
stormthrow.descJa: This move is always a critical hit unless the target is under the effect of Lucky Chant or has the Battle Armor or Shell Armor Abilities.

strengthsap.shortDescJa: User heals HP=target's Atk stat. Lowers Atk by 1.
strengthsap.descJa: Lowers the target's Attack by 1 stage. The user restores its HP equal to the target's Attack stat calculated with its stat stage before this move was used. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. Fails if the target's Attack stat stage is -6.

stringshot.descJa: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.

struggle.shortDescJa: User loses 1/4 of its max HP.
struggle.descJa: Deals typeless damage to a random opposing Pokemon. If this move was successful, the user loses 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded half up, and the Rock Head Ability does not prevent this. This move is automatically used if none of the user's known moves can be selected.

strugglebug.shortDescJa: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Sp. Atk by 1.
strugglebug.descJa: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.

stuffcheeks.shortDescJa: Fails unless the user has a berry. User eats Berry, Def +2.
stuffcheeks.descJa: Fails if the user is not holding a Berry. The user eats its Berry and raises its Defense by 2 stages. This effect is not prevented by the Klutz or Unnerve Abilities, or the effects of Embargo or Magic Room.

substitute.shortDescJa: 使用者は交代を行うために最大HPの1/4を消費します。
substitute.descJa: The user takes 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down, and puts it into a substitute to take its place in battle. The substitute is removed once enough damage is inflicted on it, if the user switches out or faints, or if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up. Baton Pass can be used to transfer the substitute to an ally, and the substitute will keep its remaining HP. Until the substitute is broken, it receives damage from all attacks made by other Pokemon and shields the user from status effects and stat stage changes caused by other Pokemon. Sound-based moves and Pokemon with the Infiltrator Ability ignore substitutes. The user still takes normal damage from weather and status effects while behind its substitute. If the substitute breaks during a multi-hit attack, the user will take damage from any remaining hits. If a substitute is created while the user is trapped by a binding move, the binding effect ends immediately. Fails if the user does not have enough HP remaining to create a substitute without fainting, or if it already has a substitute.

suckerpunch.shortDescJa: Usually goes first. Fails if target is not attacking.
suckerpunch.descJa: Fails if the target did not select a physical attack, special attack, or Me First for use this turn, or if the target moves before the user.

sunnyday.shortDescJa: For 5 turns, intense sunlight powers Fire moves.
sunnyday.descJa: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Sunny Day. The damage of Fire-type attacks is multiplied by 1.5 and the damage of Water-type attacks is multiplied by 0.5 during the effect. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Heat Rock. Fails if the current weather is Sunny Day.

superfang.shortDescJa: Does damage equal to 1/2 target's current HP.
superfang.descJa: Deals damage to the target equal to half of its current HP, rounded down, but not less than 1 HP.

supercellslam.shortDescJa: User is hurt by 50% of its max HP if it misses.
supercellslam.descJa: If this attack is not successful, the user loses half of its maximum HP, rounded down, as crash damage. Pokemon with the Magic Guard Ability are unaffected by crash damage. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.

superpower.shortDescJa: Lowers the user's Attack and Defense by 1.
superpower.descJa: Lowers the user's Attack and Defense by 1 stage.

surf.shortDescJa: Hits adjacent Pokemon. Double damage on Dive.
surf.descJa: Damage doubles if the target is using Dive.

swagger.shortDescJa: Raises the target's Attack by 2 and confuses it.
swagger.descJa: Raises the target's Attack by 2 stages and confuses it.

swallow.shortDescJa: Heals the user based on uses of Stockpile.
swallow.descJa: The user restores its HP based on its Stockpile count. Restores 1/4 of its maximum HP if it's 1, 1/2 of its maximum HP if it's 2, both rounded half down, and all of its HP if it's 3. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 0. The user's Defense and Special Defense decrease by as many stages as Stockpile had increased them, and the user's Stockpile count resets to 0.

sweetkiss.shortDescJa: Causes the target to become confused.
sweetkiss.descJa: Causes the target to become confused.

sweetscent.descJa: Lowers the target's evasiveness by 2 stages.

switcheroo.shortDescJa: User switches its held item with the target's.
switcheroo.descJa: The user swaps its held item with the target's held item. Fails if either the user or the target is holding a Mail or Z-Crystal, if neither is holding an item, if the user is trying to give or take a Mega Stone to or from the species that can Mega Evolve with it, or if the user is trying to give or take a Blue Orb, a Red Orb, a Griseous Orb, a Plate, a Drive, or a Memory to or from a Kyogre, a Groudon, a Giratina, an Arceus, a Genesect, or a Silvally, respectively. The target is immune to this move if it has the Sticky Hold Ability.

swordsdance.descJa: Raises the user's Attack by 2 stages.

synthesis.shortDescJa: Heals the user by a weather-dependent amount.
synthesis.descJa: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP if Delta Stream or no weather conditions are in effect or if the user is holding Utility Umbrella, 2/3 of its maximum HP if the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, and 1/4 of its maximum HP if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow, all rounded half down.

syrupbomb.shortDescJa: Target's Speed is lowered by 1 stage for 3 turns.
syrupbomb.descJa: If this move is successful, it causes the target's Speed to be lowered by 1 stage at the end of each turn for 3 turns.

tailslap.descJa: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

tailwind.shortDescJa: 4ターンの間、味方の素早さが2倍になる。
tailwind.descJa: For 4 turns, the user and its party members have their Speed doubled. Fails if this move is already in effect for the user's side.

taunt.shortDescJa: Target can't use status moves its next 3 turns.
taunt.descJa: Prevents the target from using non-damaging moves for its next three turns. Pokemon with the Oblivious Ability or protected by the Aroma Veil Ability are immune.

tearfullook.shortDescJa: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1.
tearfullook.descJa: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage.

teatime.shortDescJa: All active Pokemon consume held Berries.
teatime.descJa: All active Pokemon consume their held Berries. This effect is not prevented by substitutes, the Klutz or Unnerve Abilities, or the effects of Embargo or Magic Room. Fails if no active Pokemon is holding a Berry.

teeterdance.descJa: Causes the target to become confused.

temperflare.shortDescJa: Power doubles if the user's last move failed.
temperflare.descJa: Power doubles if the user's last move on the previous turn, including moves called by other moves or those used through Instruct, Magic Coat, Snatch, or the Dancer or Magic Bounce Abilities, failed to do any of its normal effects, not including damage from an unsuccessful High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, or Mind Blown, or if the user was prevented from moving by any effect other than recharging or Sky Drop. A move that was blocked by Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, Spiky Shield, Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard will not double this move's power, nor will Bounce or Fly ending early due to the effect of Gravity, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.

terrainpulse.shortDescJa: User on terrain: power doubles, type varies.
terrainpulse.descJa: Power doubles if the user is grounded and a terrain is active, and this move's type changes to match. Electric type during Electric Terrain, Grass type during Grassy Terrain, Fairy type during Misty Terrain, and Psychic type during Psychic Terrain.

thief.shortDescJa: If the user has no item, it steals the target's.
thief.descJa: If this attack was successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held item if the user is not holding one. The target's item is not stolen if it is a Mail or Z-Crystal, or if the target is a Kyogre holding a Blue Orb, a Groudon holding a Red Orb, a Giratina holding a Griseous Orb, an Arceus holding a Plate, a Genesect holding a Drive, a Silvally holding a Memory, or a Pokemon that can Mega Evolve holding the Mega Stone for its species. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

thrash.shortDescJa: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
thrash.descJa: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.

throatchop.shortDescJa: For 2 turns, the target cannot use sound moves.
throatchop.descJa: For 2 turns, the target cannot use sound-based moves.

thunder.shortDescJa: 30% chance to paralyze. Can't miss in rain.
thunder.descJa: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target. This move can hit a target using Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, or is under the effect of Sky Drop. If the weather is Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, this move does not check accuracy. If the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, this move's accuracy is 50%. If this move is used against a Pokemon holding Utility Umbrella, this move's accuracy remains at 70%.

thunderfang.shortDescJa: 10% chance to paralyze. 10% chance to flinch.
thunderfang.descJa: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target and a 10% chance to make it flinch.

thunderpunch.descJa: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

thunderwave.descJa: Paralyzes the target. This move does not ignore type immunity.

thunderbolt.descJa: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

tickle.shortDescJa: Lowers the target's Attack and Defense by 1.
tickle.descJa: Lowers the target's Attack and Defense by 1 stage.

tidyup.shortDescJa: User +1 Atk, Spe. Clears all substitutes/hazards.
tidyup.descJa: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1 stage. Removes substitutes from all active Pokemon and ends the effects of Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, and Toxic Spikes for both sides.

torchsong.shortDescJa: 100% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1.
torchsong.descJa: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Special Attack by 1 stage.

torment.shortDescJa: Target can't select the same move twice in a row.
torment.descJa: ターゲットが2ターン連続で同じ技を選択できないようにする。この効果は、ターゲットがアクティブでなくなると終了します。

toxic.shortDescJa: Badly poisons the target. Poison types can't miss.
toxic.descJa: Badly poisons the target. If a Poison-type Pokemon uses this move, the target cannot avoid the attack, even if the target is in the middle of a two-turn move.

toxicspikes.shortDescJa: Poisons grounded foes on switch-in. Max 2 layers.
toxicspikes.descJa: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, poisoning each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Can be used up to two times before failing. Opposing Pokemon become poisoned with one layer and badly poisoned with two layers. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, is hit by Defog, or a grounded Poison-type Pokemon switches in. Safeguard prevents the opposing party from being poisoned on switch-in, but a substitute does not.

toxicthread.shortDescJa: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 and poisons it.
toxicthread.descJa: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages and poisons it.

trailblaze.shortDescJa: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1.
trailblaze.descJa: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

transform.shortDescJa: Copies target's stats, moves, types, and Ability.
transform.descJa: The user transforms into the target. The target's current stats, stat stages, types, moves, Ability, weight, gender, and sprite are copied. The user's level and HP remain the same and each copied move receives only 5 PP, with a maximum of 5 PP each. The user can no longer change formes if it would have the ability to do so. This move fails if it hits a substitute, if either the user or the target is already transformed, or if either is behind an Illusion.

triattack.shortDescJa: 20% chance to paralyze or burn or freeze target.
triattack.descJa: Has a 20% chance to either burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

trick.shortDescJa: User switches its held item with the target's.
trick.descJa: The user swaps its held item with the target's held item. Fails if either the user or the target is holding a Mail or Z-Crystal, if neither is holding an item, if the user is trying to give or take a Mega Stone to or from the species that can Mega Evolve with it, or if the user is trying to give or take a Blue Orb, a Red Orb, a Griseous Orb, a Plate, a Drive, or a Memory to or from a Kyogre, a Groudon, a Giratina, an Arceus, a Genesect, or a Silvally, respectively. The target is immune to this move if it has the Sticky Hold Ability.

trickroom.shortDescJa: Goes last. For 5 turns, turn order is reversed.
trickroom.descJa: For 5 turns, the Speed of every Pokemon is recalculated for the purposes of determining turn order. During the effect, each Pokemon's Speed is considered to be (10000 - its normal Speed), and if this value is greater than 8191, 8192 is subtracted from it. If this move is used during the effect, the effect ends.

trickortreat.shortDescJa: Adds Ghost to the target's type(s).
trickortreat.descJa: Causes the Ghost type to be added to the target, effectively making it have two or three types. Fails if the target is already a Ghost type. If Forest's Curse adds a type to the target, it replaces the type added by this move and vice versa.

triplearrows.descJa: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage, a 30% chance to make it flinch, and a higher chance for a critical hit.

tripleaxel.shortDescJa: Hits 3 times. Each hit can miss, but power rises.
tripleaxel.descJa: Hits three times. Power increases to 40 for the second hit and 60 for the third. This move checks accuracy for each hit, and the attack ends if the target avoids a hit. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit three times.

tropkick.shortDescJa: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
tropkick.descJa: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.

twinbeam.descJa: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit.

uturn.shortDescJa: User switches out after damaging the target.
uturn.descJa: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members, or if the target switched out using an Eject Button or through the effect of the Emergency Exit or Wimp Out Abilities.

upperhand.shortDescJa: 100% flinch. Fails unless target using priority.
upperhand.descJa: Has a 100% chance to make the target flinch. Fails if the target did not select a priority move for use this turn, or if the target moves before the user.

uproar.shortDescJa: Lasts 3 turns. Active Pokemon cannot fall asleep.
uproar.descJa: The user spends three turns locked into this move. This move targets an opponent at random on each turn. On the first of the three turns, all sleeping active Pokemon wake up. During the three turns, no active Pokemon can fall asleep by any means, and Pokemon switched in during the effect do not wake up. If the user is prevented from moving or the attack is not successful against the target during one of the turns, the effect ends.

vacuumwave.shortDescJa: 通常は最初に進みます。

venoshock.shortDescJa: Power doubles if the target is poisoned.
venoshock.descJa: Power doubles if the target is poisoned.

voltswitch.shortDescJa: User switches out after damaging the target.
voltswitch.descJa: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members, or if the target switched out using an Eject Button or through the effect of the Emergency Exit or Wimp Out Abilities.

volttackle.shortDescJa: Has 33% recoil. 10% chance to paralyze target.
volttackle.descJa: 10%の確率で対象を麻痺させる。ターゲットが HP を失った場合、ユーザーはターゲットが失った HP の 33% (半分を切り上げ) に等しい反動ダメージを受けますが、1 HP 以上です。

waterpulse.descJa: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.

watershuriken.shortDescJa: Usually goes first. Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
watershuriken.descJa: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is an Ash-Greninja with the Battle Bond Ability, this move has a power of 20 and always hits three times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

waterspout.shortDescJa: Less power as user's HP decreases. Hits foe(s).
waterspout.descJa: Power is equal to (user's current HP * 150 / user's maximum HP), rounded down, but not less than 1.

waterfall.shortDescJa: 20% chance to make the target flinch.
waterfall.descJa: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

wavecrash.descJa: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

weatherball.shortDescJa: Power doubles and type varies in each weather.
weatherball.descJa: Power doubles if a weather condition other than Delta Stream is active, and this move's type changes to match. Ice type during Snow, Water type during Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, Rock type during Sandstorm, and Fire type during Desolate Land or Sunny Day. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and uses Weather Ball during Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Desolate Land, or Sunny Day, this move remains Normal type and does not double in power.

whirlpool.shortDescJa: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
whirlpool.descJa: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

whirlwind.shortDescJa: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.
whirlwind.descJa: The target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. Fails if the target is the last unfainted Pokemon in its party, or if the target used Ingrain previously or has the Suction Cups Ability.

wideguard.shortDescJa: Protects allies from multi-target moves this turn.
wideguard.descJa: The user and its party members are protected from moves made by other Pokemon, including allies, during this turn that target all adjacent foes or all adjacent Pokemon. This move modifies the same 1/X chance of being successful used by other protection moves, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used, but does not use the chance to check for failure. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn or if this move is already in effect for the user's side.

wildcharge.descJa: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 1/4 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

wish.shortDescJa: Next turn, 50% of the user's max HP is restored.
wish.descJa: At the end of the next turn, the Pokemon at the user's position has 1/2 of the user's maximum HP restored to it, rounded down. Fails if this move is already in effect for the user's position.

wonderroom.shortDescJa: For 5 turns, all Defense and Sp. Def stats switch.
wonderroom.descJa: For 5 turns, all active Pokemon have their Defense and Special Defense stats swapped. Stat stage changes are unaffected. If this move is used during the effect, the effect ends.

woodhammer.descJa: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

worryseed.descJa: Causes the target's Ability to become Insomnia. Fails if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Insomnia, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Truant, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

wrap.shortDescJa: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
wrap.descJa: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

yawn.shortDescJa: Puts the target to sleep after 1 turn.
yawn.descJa: Causes the target to fall asleep at the end of the next turn. Fails when used if the target cannot fall asleep or if it already has a non-volatile status condition. At the end of the next turn, if the target is still active, does not have a non-volatile status condition, and can fall asleep, it falls asleep. If the target becomes affected, this effect cannot be prevented by Safeguard or a substitute, or by falling asleep and waking up during the effect.

zapcannon.descJa: Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.

zenheadbutt.shortDescJa: 20% chance to make the target flinch.
zenheadbutt.descJa: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

adaptability.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's same-type attack bonus (STAB) is 2 instead of 1.5.
adaptability.descJa: This Pokemon's moves that match one of its types have a same-type attack bonus (STAB) of 2 instead of 1.5.

aerilate.shortDescJa: このポケモンのノーマルタイプの技がひこうタイプになり、威力が1.2倍になる。
aerilate.descJa: このポケモンのノーマルタイプの技はひこうタイプの技になり、威力が1.2倍になる。この効果は、技のタイプを変更する他の効果の後、イオン デリュージとエレクトリファイの効果の前に発生します。

aftermath.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon is KOed with a contact move, that move's user loses 1/4 its max HP.
aftermath.descJa: このポケモンが接触技で気絶した場合、その技の使用者は最大HPの1/4（切り捨て）を失う。技の使用者がマジックガード能力を持っている場合、またはアクティブなポケモンが湿り能力を持っている場合、この効果は防止されます。

airlock.shortDescJa: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of weather conditions are disabled.
airlock.descJa: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of weather conditions are disabled.

analytic.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's attacks have 1.3x power if it is the last to move in a turn.
analytic.descJa: The power of this Pokemon's move is multiplied by 1.3 if it is the last to move in a turn. Does not affect Doom Desire and Future Sight.

angerpoint.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon (not its substitute) takes a critical hit, its Attack is raised 12 stages.
angerpoint.descJa: If this Pokemon, but not its substitute, is struck by a critical hit, its Attack is raised by 12 stages.

angershell.shortDescJa: At 1/2 or less of this Pokemon's max HP: +1 Atk, Sp. Atk, Spe, and -1 Def, Sp. Def.
angershell.descJa: When this Pokemon has more than 1/2 its maximum HP and takes damage from an attack bringing it to 1/2 or less of its maximum HP, its Attack, Special Attack, and Speed are raised by 1 stage, and its Defense and Special Defense are lowered by 1 stage. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability.

anticipation.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon shudders if any foe has a supereffective or OHKO move.
anticipation.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon is alerted if any opposing Pokemon has an attacking move with a type that is super effective against this Pokemon, or any OHKO move. This effect considers Hidden Power to be its determined type, and every other move to be its original type.

arenatrap.shortDescJa: Prevents opposing Pokemon from choosing to switch out unless they are airborne.
arenatrap.descJa: Prevents opposing Pokemon from choosing to switch out unless they are airborne, are holding a Shed Shell, or are a Ghost type.

armortail.shortDescJa: This Pokemon and its allies are protected from opposing priority moves.
armortail.descJa: Priority moves used by opposing Pokemon targeting this Pokemon or its allies are prevented from having an effect.

aromaveil.shortDescJa: Protects user/allies from Attract, Disable, Encore, Heal Block, Taunt, and Torment.
aromaveil.descJa: This Pokemon and its allies cannot become affected by Attract, Disable, Encore, Heal Block, Taunt, or Torment.

asoneglastrier.shortDescJa: Unnerve と Chilling Neighbor の能力の組み合わせ。
asoneglastrier.descJa: Unnerve と Chilling Neighbor の能力の組み合わせ。

asonespectrier.shortDescJa: Combination of the Unnerve and Grim Neigh Abilities.
asonespectrier.descJa: Combination of the Unnerve and Grim Neigh Abilities.

aurabreak.shortDescJa: このポケモンが発動している間、ダークオーラとフェアリーオーラの威力補正は0.75倍になる。
aurabreak.descJa: このポケモンが発動している間、ダークオーラとフェアリーオーラの能力の効果が逆転し、ダークタイプとフェアリータイプの技の威力がそれぞれ1.33倍ではなく3/4倍になります。

baddreams.shortDescJa: Causes sleeping foes to lose 1/8 of their max HP at the end of each turn.
baddreams.descJa: Causes opposing Pokemon to lose 1/8 of their maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn if they are asleep.

ballfetch.shortDescJa: 競争上の使用はありません。
ballfetch.descJa: 競争上の使用はありません。

battery.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's allies have the power of their special attacks multiplied by 1.3.
battery.descJa: This Pokemon's allies have the power of their special attacks multiplied by 1.3.

battlearmor.shortDescJa: This Pokemon cannot be struck by a critical hit.
battlearmor.descJa: This Pokemon cannot be struck by a critical hit.

battlebond.shortDescJa: ポケモンをKOした後：攻撃力とSpが上昇する。攻撃力、速度が1段階上がる。戦闘ごとに 1 回。
battlebond.descJa: このポケモンがグレニンジャの場合、他のポケモンを攻撃して気絶させると、攻撃・特攻・素早さが1段階上がる。この効果は戦闘ごとに 1 回のみ発生します。

beadsofruin.shortDescJa: Active Pokemon without this Ability have their Special Defense multiplied by 0.75.
beadsofruin.descJa: Active Pokemon without this Ability have their Special Defense multiplied by 0.75.

beastboost.shortDescJa: このポケモンの最高ステータスは、他のポケモンを攻撃して倒すと1上がる。
beastboost.descJa: 他のポケモンを攻撃して気絶させると、このポケモンの最高ステータスが1段階上がる。ステータスステージの変化は考慮されません。複数のステータスが同点の場合は、攻撃、防御、特攻、特防、素早さの順に優先されます。

berserk.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Sp. Atk is raised by 1 when it reaches 1/2 or less of its max HP.
berserk.descJa: When this Pokemon has more than 1/2 its maximum HP and takes damage from an attack bringing it to 1/2 or less of its maximum HP, its Special Attack is raised by 1 stage. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability.

bigpecks.shortDescJa: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's Defense stat stage.
bigpecks.descJa: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's Defense stat stage.

blaze.shortDescJa: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Fire attacks.
blaze.descJa: When this Pokemon has 1/3 or less of its maximum HP, rounded down, its offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Fire-type attack.

bulletproof.shortDescJa: This Pokemon is immune to bullet moves.
bulletproof.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to bullet moves.

cheekpouch.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon eats a Berry, it restores 1/3 of its max HP after the Berry's effect.
cheekpouch.descJa: If this Pokemon eats a held Berry, it restores 1/3 of its maximum HP, rounded down, in addition to the Berry's effect. This effect can also activate after the effects of Bug Bite, Fling, Pluck, Stuff Cheeks, and Teatime if the eaten Berry had an effect on this Pokemon.

chillingneigh.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and KOes another Pokemon.
chillingneigh.descJa: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and knocks out another Pokemon.

chlorophyll.shortDescJa: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.
chlorophyll.descJa: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled. This effect is prevented if this Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella.

clearbody.shortDescJa: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.
clearbody.descJa: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.

cloudnine.shortDescJa: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of weather conditions are disabled.
cloudnine.descJa: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of weather conditions are disabled.

colorchange.shortDescJa: このポケモンは、タイプを持たない限り、その技を当てたタイプにタイプが変わる。
colorchange.descJa: このポケモンのタイプは、そのタイプがすでにそのタイプのいずれかである場合を除き、最後にヒットした技のタイプに一致するように変化します。この効果は多段ヒット技のすべてのヒット後に適用されます。この動きにシアーフォース能力によって削除された二次効果がある場合、この効果は防止されます。

comatose.shortDescJa: This Pokemon cannot be statused, and is considered to be asleep.
comatose.descJa: This Pokemon is considered to be asleep and cannot become affected by a non-volatile status condition or Yawn.

commander.shortDescJa: If ally is Dondozo: this Pokemon cannot act or be hit, +2 to all Dondozo's stats.
commander.descJa: If this Pokemon is a Tatsugiri and a Dondozo is an active ally, this Pokemon goes into the Dondozo's mouth. The Dondozo has its Attack, Special Attack, Speed, Defense, and Special Defense raised by 2 stages. During the effect, the Dondozo cannot be switched out, this Pokemon cannot select an action, and attacks targeted at this Pokemon will be avoided but it will still take indirect damage. If this Pokemon faints during the effect, a Pokemon can be switched in as a replacement but the Dondozo remains unable to be switched out. If the Dondozo faints during the effect, this Pokemon regains the ability to select an action.

competitive.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Sp. Atk is raised by 2 for each of its stats that is lowered by a foe.
competitive.descJa: このポケモンの特攻は、相手のポケモンによってステータスが下がるごとに2段階上がる。

compoundeyes.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's moves have their accuracy multiplied by 1.3.
compoundeyes.descJa: This Pokemon's moves have their accuracy multiplied by 1.3.

contrary.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon has a stat stage raised it is lowered instead, and vice versa.
contrary.descJa: If this Pokemon has a stat stage raised it is lowered instead, and vice versa.

corrosion.shortDescJa: This Pokemon can poison or badly poison a Pokemon regardless of its typing.
corrosion.descJa: This Pokemon can poison or badly poison a Pokemon regardless of its typing.

costar.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon copies all of its ally's stat stage changes.
costar.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon copies all of its ally's stat stage changes.

cottondown.shortDescJa: このポケモンがヒットすると、フィールド上の他のポケモンすべての『すばやさ』を1段階下げる。
cottondown.descJa: このポケモンが攻撃を受けた時、フィールド上の他のポケモンすべての『すばやさ』を1段階下げる。

cudchew.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon eats a Berry, it will eat that Berry again at the end of the next turn.
cudchew.descJa: If this Pokemon eats a Berry, it will eat that Berry again at the end of the next turn.

curiousmedicine.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon's allies have their stat stages reset to 0.
curiousmedicine.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon's allies have their stat stages reset to 0.

cursedbody.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon is hit by an attack, there is a 30% chance that move gets disabled.
cursedbody.descJa: If this Pokemon is hit by an attack, there is a 30% chance that move gets disabled unless one of the attacker's moves is already disabled.

cutecharm.shortDescJa: 30% chance of infatuating Pokemon of the opposite gender if they make contact.
cutecharm.descJa: There is a 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will become infatuated if it is of the opposite gender.

damp.shortDescJa: Prevents Explosion/Mind Blown/Misty Explosion/Self-Destruct/Aftermath while active.
damp.descJa: While this Pokemon is active, Explosion, Mind Blown, Misty Explosion, Self-Destruct, and the Aftermath Ability are prevented from having an effect.

dancer.shortDescJa: After another Pokemon uses a dance move, this Pokemon uses the same move.
dancer.descJa: After another Pokemon uses a dance move, this Pokemon uses the same move. The copied move is subject to all effects that can prevent a move from being executed. A move used through this Ability cannot be copied again by other Pokemon with this Ability.

darkaura.shortDescJa: このポケモンが発動している間、どのポケモンが使うあくの技の威力は1.33倍になる。
darkaura.descJa: このポケモンが発動している間、発動中のポケモンが使うあくタイプの技の威力は1.33倍になる。

dauntlessshield.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon's Defense is raised by 1 stage. Once per battle.
dauntlessshield.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon's Defense is raised by 1 stage. Once per battle.

dazzling.shortDescJa: This Pokemon and its allies are protected from opposing priority moves.
dazzling.descJa: Priority moves used by opposing Pokemon targeting this Pokemon or its allies are prevented from having an effect.

defeatist.shortDescJa: このポケモンのHP、こうげき、SPが最大値の1/2以下のときは、攻撃力が半減する。
defeatist.descJa: このポケモンはHPが最大HPの1/2以下の間、攻撃と特攻が半分になる。

defiant.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 2 for each of its stats that is lowered by a foe.
defiant.descJa: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 2 stages for each of its stat stages that is lowered by an opposing Pokemon.

deltastream.shortDescJa: スイッチインすると、このアビリティが戦闘でアクティブでなくなるまで、強風が始まります。
deltastream.descJa: スイッチインすると天気がデルタストリームになり、ひこうタイプのポケモンからひこうタイプの弱点がなくなる。この天気は、この能力がどのポケモンに対しても有効でなくなるまで、または荒れ果てた土地または原初の海の能力によって天気が変更されるまで、効果が続きます。

desolateland.shortDescJa: スイッチを入れると、このアビリティが戦闘でアクティブでなくなるまで、非常に厳しい日差しが降り注ぎます。
desolateland.descJa: スイッチインすると、天気は荒涼とした土地になり、晴れの日のすべての効果が含まれ、ダメージを与える水タイプの動きが実行されなくなります。この天気は、この能力がどのポケモンに対しても有効でなくなるまで、またはデルタストリームまたは原初の海の能力によって天気が変更されるまで、効果が続きます。

disguise.shortDescJa: (Mimikyu only) The first hit it takes is blocked, and it takes 1/8 HP damage instead.
disguise.descJa: If this Pokemon is a Mimikyu, the first hit it takes in battle deals 0 neutral damage. Its disguise is then broken, it changes to Busted Form, and it loses 1/8 of its max HP. Confusion damage also breaks the disguise.

download.shortDescJa: On switch-in, Attack or Sp. Atk is raised 1 stage based on the foes' weaker Defense.
download.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon's Attack or Special Attack is raised by 1 stage based on the weaker combined defensive stat of all opposing Pokemon. Attack is raised if their Defense is lower, and Special Attack is raised if their Special Defense is the same or lower.

dragonsmaw.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Dragon-type attack.
dragonsmaw.descJa: This Pokemon's offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Dragon-type attack.

dragonize.shortDescJa: このポケモンのノーマルタイプの技がドラゴンタイプになり、威力が1.2倍になる。
dragonize.descJa: このポケモンのノーマルタイプの技はドラゴンタイプの技になり、威力が1.2倍になる。この効果は、技のタイプを変更する他の効果の後、イオン デリュージとエレクトリファイの効果の前に発生します。

drizzle.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Rain Dance.
drizzle.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Rain Dance.

drought.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Sunny Day.
drought.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Sunny Day.

dryskin.shortDescJa: This Pokemon is healed 1/4 by Water, 1/8 by Rain; is hurt 1.25x by Fire, 1/8 by Sun.
dryskin.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to Water-type moves and restores 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down, when hit by a Water-type move. The power of Fire-type moves is multiplied by 1.25 when used on this Pokemon. At the end of each turn, this Pokemon restores 1/8 of its maximum HP, rounded down, if the weather is Rain Dance, and loses 1/8 of its maximum HP, rounded down, if the weather is Sunny Day. The weather effects are prevented if this Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella.

earlybird.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's sleep counter drops by 2 instead of 1.
earlybird.descJa: This Pokemon's sleep counter drops by 2 instead of 1.

eartheater.shortDescJa: This Pokemon heals 1/4 of its max HP when hit by Ground moves; Ground immunity.
eartheater.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to Ground-type moves and restores 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down, when hit by a Ground-type move.

effectspore.shortDescJa: 30% chance of poison/paralysis/sleep on others making contact with this Pokemon.
effectspore.descJa: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be poisoned, paralyzed, or fall asleep.

electricsurge.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Electric Terrain.
electricsurge.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Electric Terrain.

electromorphosis.shortDescJa: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when it takes a hit from an attack.
electromorphosis.descJa: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when it takes a hit from an attack.

embodyaspectcornerstone.shortDescJa: スイッチを入れると、このポケモンの防御力が1段階上がる。
embodyaspectcornerstone.descJa: スイッチを入れると、このポケモンの防御力が1段階上がる。

embodyaspecthearthflame.shortDescJa: スイッチを入れると、このポケモンの攻撃が1段階上がる。
embodyaspecthearthflame.descJa: スイッチを入れると、このポケモンの攻撃が1段階上がる。

embodyaspectteal.shortDescJa: スイッチを入れると、このポケモンの素早さが1段階上がる。
embodyaspectteal.descJa: スイッチを入れると、このポケモンの素早さが1段階上がる。

embodyaspectwellspring.shortDescJa: スイッチを入れると、このポケモンの特防が1段階上がる。
embodyaspectwellspring.descJa: スイッチを入れると、このポケモンの特防が1段階上がる。

emergencyexit.shortDescJa: このポケモンは最大HPの1/2以下になると交代する。
emergencyexit.descJa: このポケモンの最大HPが1/2を超え、ダメージを受けて最大HPの1/2以下になると、すぐに選んだ味方と交代する。この効果は多段ヒット技のすべてのヒット後に適用されます。この動きにシアーフォース能力によって削除された二次効果がある場合、この効果は防止されます。この効果は、使用時の呪いと身代わり、腹太鼓、痛みの分割、および混乱ダメージを除く、直接的および間接的なダメージの両方に適用されます。

fairyaura.shortDescJa: このポケモンが発動している間、どのポケモンが使うフェアリー技の威力も1.33倍になる。
fairyaura.descJa: このポケモンが発動している間、発動中のポケモンが使うフェアリータイプの技の威力は1.33倍になる。

filter.shortDescJa: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.
filter.descJa: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.

flamebody.shortDescJa: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be burned.
flamebody.descJa: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be burned.

flareboost.shortDescJa: While this Pokemon is burned, its special attacks have 1.5x power.
flareboost.descJa: While this Pokemon is burned, the power of its special attacks is multiplied by 1.5.

flashfire.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Fire attacks do 1.5x damage if hit by one Fire move; Fire immunity.
flashfire.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to Fire-type moves. The first time it is hit by a Fire-type move, its offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Fire-type attack as long as it remains active and has this Ability. If this Pokemon is frozen, it cannot be defrosted by Fire-type attacks.

flowergift.shortDescJa: 使用者がチェリムでサニーデイがアクティブの場合、それと味方の攻撃力とSpが1になります。防御力は1.5倍。
flowergift.descJa: このポケモンがチェリムでサニーデイが発動している場合、サンシャインフォルムに変化し、このポケモンと味方の攻撃と特防が1.5倍になる。ポケモンがユーティリティアンブレラを持っている場合、これらの効果は防止されます。

flowerveil.shortDescJa: This side's Grass types can't have stats lowered or status inflicted by other Pokemon.
flowerveil.descJa: Grass-type Pokemon on this Pokemon's side cannot have their stat stages lowered by other Pokemon or have a non-volatile status condition inflicted on them by other Pokemon.

fluffy.shortDescJa: This Pokemon takes 1/2 damage from contact moves, 2x damage from Fire moves.
fluffy.descJa: This Pokemon receives 1/2 damage from contact moves, but double damage from Fire moves.

forecast.shortDescJa: Castform のタイプは、砂嵐を除く現在の気象条件のタイプに変わります。
forecast.descJa: このポケモンがキャストフォームの場合、タイプは砂嵐以外の現在の天候のタイプに変わります。このポケモンがユーティリティ傘を持っていて、天気が雨踊りまたは晴れの場合、この効果は防止されます。

forewarn.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon is alerted to the foes' move with the highest power.
forewarn.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon is alerted to the move with the highest power, at random, known by an opposing Pokemon. This effect considers OHKO moves to have 150 power, Counter, Mirror Coat, and Metal Burst to have 120 power, every other attacking move with an unspecified power to have 80 power, and non-damaging moves to have 1 power.

friendguard.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's allies receive 3/4 damage from other Pokemon's attacks.
friendguard.descJa: This Pokemon's allies receive 3/4 damage from other Pokemon's attacks.

frisk.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon identifies the held items of all opposing Pokemon.
frisk.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon identifies the held items of all opposing Pokemon.

fullmetalbody.shortDescJa: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.
fullmetalbody.descJa: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.

galewings.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon is at full HP, its Flying-type moves have their priority increased by 1.
galewings.descJa: If this Pokemon is at full HP, its Flying-type moves have their priority increased by 1.

galvanize.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Electric type and have 1.2x power.
galvanize.descJa: このポケモンのノーマルタイプの技はでんきタイプの技になり、威力が1.2倍になる。この効果は、技のタイプを変更する他の効果の後、イオン デリュージとエレクトリファイの効果の前に発生します。

gluttony.shortDescJa: This Pokemon eats Berries at 1/2 max HP or less instead of their usual 1/4 max HP.
gluttony.descJa: When this Pokemon is holding a Berry that usually activates with 1/4 or less of its maximum HP, it is eaten at 1/2 or less of its maximum HP instead.

goodasgold.shortDescJa: This Pokemon is immune to Status moves.
goodasgold.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to Status moves.

gooey.shortDescJa: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Speed lowered by 1 stage.
gooey.descJa: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Speed lowered by 1 stage.

gorillatactics.shortDescJa: このポケモンの攻撃は1.5倍ですが、最初に実行する技しか選択できません。
gorillatactics.descJa: このポケモンの攻撃は1.5倍になるが、最初に実行する技しか選択できない。このポケモンがダイマックスしている間、これらの効果は無効になる。

grasspelt.shortDescJa: If Grassy Terrain is active, this Pokemon's Defense is multiplied by 1.5.
grasspelt.descJa: If Grassy Terrain is active, this Pokemon's Defense is multiplied by 1.5.

grassysurge.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Grassy Terrain.
grassysurge.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Grassy Terrain.

grimneigh.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Sp. Atk is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and KOes another Pokemon.
grimneigh.descJa: This Pokemon's Special Attack is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and knocks out another Pokemon.

guarddog.shortDescJa: Immune to Intimidate. Intimidated: +1 Attack. Cannot be forced to switch out.
guarddog.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to the effect of the Intimidate Ability and raises its Attack by 1 stage instead. This Pokemon cannot be forced to switch out by another Pokemon's attack or item.

gulpmissile.shortDescJa: When hit after Surf/Dive, attacker takes 1/4 max HP and -1 Defense or paralysis.
gulpmissile.descJa: If this Pokemon is a Cramorant, it changes forme when it hits a target with Surf or uses the first turn of Dive successfully. It becomes Gulping Form with an Arrokuda in its mouth if it has more than 1/2 of its maximum HP remaining, or Gorging Form with a Pikachu in its mouth if it has 1/2 or less of its maximum HP remaining. If Cramorant gets hit in Gulping or Gorging Form, it spits the Arrokuda or Pikachu at its attacker, even if it has no HP remaining. The projectile deals damage equal to 1/4 of the target's maximum HP, rounded down; this damage is blocked by the Magic Guard Ability but not by a substitute. An Arrokuda also lowers the target's Defense by 1 stage, and a Pikachu paralyzes the target. Cramorant will return to normal if it spits out a projectile, switches out, or Dynamaxes.

guts.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon is statused, its Attack is 1.5x; ignores burn halving physical damage.
guts.descJa: If this Pokemon has a non-volatile status condition, its Attack is multiplied by 1.5. This Pokemon's physical attacks ignore the burn effect of halving damage.

hadronengine.shortDescJa: On switch-in, summons Electric Terrain. During Electric Terrain, Sp. Atk is 1.3333x.
hadronengine.descJa: On switch-in, summons Electric Terrain. During Electric Terrain, Sp. Atk is 1.3333x.

harvest.shortDescJa: If last item used is a Berry, 50% chance to restore it each end of turn. 100% in Sun.
harvest.descJa: If the last item this Pokemon used is a Berry, there is a 50% chance it gets restored at the end of each turn. If Sunny Day is active, this chance is 100%.

healer.shortDescJa: 50% chance this Pokemon's ally has its status cured at the end of each turn.
healer.descJa: 50% chance this Pokemon's ally has its non-volatile status condition cured at the end of each turn.

heatproof.shortDescJa: Fire damage against this Pokemon is dealt with 1/2 offensive stat; 1/2 burn damage.
heatproof.descJa: If a Pokemon uses a Fire-type attack against this Pokemon, that Pokemon's offensive stat is halved when calculating the damage to this Pokemon. This Pokemon takes half of the usual burn damage, rounded down.

heavymetal.descJa: このポケモンの重さは2倍になる。この効果はオートマイズの効果後、フロートストーンの効果の前に計算されます。

hospitality.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon restores 1/4 of its ally's maximum HP, rounded down.
hospitality.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon restores 1/4 of its ally's maximum HP, rounded down.

hungerswitch.shortDescJa: If Morpeko, it changes between Full Belly and Hangry Mode at the end of each turn.
hungerswitch.descJa: If this Pokemon is a Morpeko, it changes formes between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode at the end of each turn.

hustle.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Attack is 1.5x and accuracy of its physical attacks is 0.8x.
hustle.descJa: This Pokemon's Attack is multiplied by 1.5 and the accuracy of its physical attacks is multiplied by 0.8.

hydration.shortDescJa: This Pokemon has its status cured at the end of each turn if Rain Dance is active.
hydration.descJa: This Pokemon has its non-volatile status condition cured at the end of each turn if Rain Dance is active. This effect is prevented if this Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella.

hypercutter.shortDescJa: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's Attack stat stage.
hypercutter.descJa: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's Attack stat stage.

icebody.shortDescJa: If Snow is active, this Pokemon heals 1/16 of its max HP each turn.
icebody.descJa: If Snow is active, this Pokemon restores 1/16 of its maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn.

iceface.shortDescJa: If Eiscue, the first physical hit it takes deals 0 damage. Effect is restored in Snow.
iceface.descJa: If this Pokemon is an Eiscue, the first physical hit it takes in battle deals 0 neutral damage. Its ice face is then broken and it changes forme to Noice Face. Eiscue regains its Ice Face forme when Snow begins or when Eiscue switches in while Snow is active. Confusion damage also breaks the ice face.

icescales.shortDescJa: This Pokemon receives 1/2 damage from special attacks.
icescales.descJa: This Pokemon receives 1/2 damage from special attacks.

illuminate.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's accuracy can't be lowered by others; ignores their evasiveness stat.
illuminate.descJa: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's accuracy stat stage. This Pokemon ignores a target's evasiveness stat stage.

illusion.shortDescJa: This Pokemon appears as the last Pokemon in the party until it takes direct damage.
illusion.descJa: When this Pokemon switches in, it appears as the last unfainted Pokemon in its party until it takes direct damage from another Pokemon's attack. This Pokemon's actual level and HP are displayed instead of those of the mimicked Pokemon.

immunity.shortDescJa: This Pokemon cannot be poisoned. Gaining this Ability while poisoned cures it.
immunity.descJa: This Pokemon cannot be poisoned. Gaining this Ability while poisoned cures it.

imposter.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon Transforms into the opposing Pokemon that is facing it.
imposter.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon Transforms into the opposing Pokemon that is facing it. If there is no Pokemon at that position, this Pokemon does not Transform.

infiltrator.shortDescJa: Moves ignore substitutes and foe's Reflect/Light Screen/Safeguard/Mist/Aurora Veil.
infiltrator.descJa: This Pokemon's moves ignore substitutes and the opposing side's Reflect, Light Screen, Safeguard, Mist, and Aurora Veil.

innardsout.shortDescJa: このポケモンが技で倒された場合、その技の使用者は同じだけHPを失う。
innardsout.descJa: このポケモンが技で気絶した場合、その技の使い手はこのポケモンに与えたダメージと同じだけHPを失う。

innerfocus.shortDescJa: This Pokemon cannot be made to flinch. Immune to Intimidate.
innerfocus.descJa: This Pokemon cannot be made to flinch. This Pokemon is immune to the effect of the Intimidate Ability.

insomnia.shortDescJa: This Pokemon cannot fall asleep. Gaining this Ability while asleep cures it.
insomnia.descJa: This Pokemon cannot fall asleep. Gaining this Ability while asleep cures it.

intimidate.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon lowers the Attack of opponents by 1 stage.
intimidate.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon lowers the Attack of opposing Pokemon by 1 stage. Pokemon with the Inner Focus, Oblivious, Own Tempo, or Scrappy Abilities and Pokemon behind a substitute are immune.

intrepidsword.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage. Once per battle.
intrepidsword.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage. Once per battle.

ironbarbs.shortDescJa: このポケモンと接触したポケモンは最大HPの1/8を失う。
ironbarbs.descJa: このポケモンと接触したポケモンは最大HPの1/8（切り捨て）を失う。

ironfist.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's punch-based attacks have 1.2x power. Sucker Punch is not boosted.
ironfist.descJa: This Pokemon's punch-based attacks have their power multiplied by 1.2.

justified.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage after it is damaged by a Dark-type move.
justified.descJa: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage after it is damaged by a Dark-type move.

keeneye.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's accuracy can't be lowered by others; ignores their evasiveness stat.
keeneye.descJa: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's accuracy stat stage. This Pokemon ignores a target's evasiveness stat stage.

klutz.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's held item has no effect, except Macho Brace. Fling cannot be used.
klutz.descJa: This Pokemon's held item has no effect. This Pokemon cannot use Fling successfully. Macho Brace, Power Anklet, Power Band, Power Belt, Power Bracer, Power Lens, and Power Weight still have their effects.

leafguard.shortDescJa: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon cannot be statused and Rest will fail for it.
leafguard.descJa: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon cannot become affected by a non-volatile status condition or Yawn, and Rest will fail for it. This effect is prevented if this Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella.

levitate.shortDescJa: This Pokemon is immune to Ground; Gravity/Ingrain/Smack Down/Iron Ball nullify it.
levitate.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to Ground-type attacks and the effects of Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, and the Arena Trap Ability. The effects of Gravity, Ingrain, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, and Iron Ball nullify the immunity. Thousand Arrows can hit this Pokemon as if it did not have this Ability.

libero.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's type changes to the type of the move it is using. Once per switch-in.
libero.descJa: This Pokemon's type changes to match the type of the move it is about to use. This effect comes after all effects that change a move's type. This effect can only happen once per switch-in, and only if this Pokemon is not Terastallized.

lightmetal.descJa: This Pokemon's weight is halved, rounded down to a tenth of a kilogram. This effect is calculated after the effect of Autotomize, and before the effect of Float Stone. A Pokemon's weight will not drop below 0.1 kg.

lightningrod.shortDescJa: This Pokemon draws Electric moves to itself to raise Sp. Atk by 1; Electric immunity.
lightningrod.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to Electric-type moves and raises its Special Attack by 1 stage when hit by an Electric-type move. If this Pokemon is not the target of a single-target Electric-type move used by another Pokemon, this Pokemon redirects that move to itself if it is within the range of that move. If multiple Pokemon could redirect with this Ability, it goes to the one with the highest Speed, or in the case of a tie to the one that has had this Ability active longer.

limber.shortDescJa: This Pokemon cannot be paralyzed. Gaining this Ability while paralyzed cures it.
limber.descJa: This Pokemon cannot be paralyzed. Gaining this Ability while paralyzed cures it.

lingeringaroma.shortDescJa: このポケモンと接触すると、攻撃者の特性が「残り香」になる。
lingeringaroma.descJa: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Ability changed to Lingering Aroma. Does not affect Pokemon with the As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Lingering Aroma, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero Abilities.

liquidooze.shortDescJa: This Pokemon damages those draining HP from it for as much as they would heal.
liquidooze.descJa: This Pokemon damages those draining HP from it for as much as they would heal.

liquidvoice.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's sound-based moves become Water type.
liquidvoice.descJa: This Pokemon's sound-based moves become Water-type moves. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.

longreach.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's attacks do not make contact with the target.
longreach.descJa: This Pokemon's attacks do not make contact with the target.
