magicbounce.shortDescJa: This Pokemon blocks certain Status moves and bounces them back to the user.
magicbounce.descJa: This Pokemon is unaffected by certain non-damaging moves directed at it and will instead use such moves against the original user. Moves reflected in this way are unable to be reflected again by this or Magic Coat's effect. Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, and Toxic Spikes can only be reflected once per side, by the leftmost Pokemon under this or Magic Coat's effect. The Lightning Rod and Storm Drain Abilities redirect their respective moves before this Ability takes effect.

magicguard.shortDescJa: This Pokemon can only be damaged by direct attacks.
magicguard.descJa: This Pokemon can only be damaged by direct attacks. Curse and Substitute on use, Belly Drum, Pain Split, Struggle recoil, and confusion damage are considered direct damage.

magician.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon has no item, it steals the item off a Pokemon it hits with an attack.
magician.descJa: If this Pokemon has no item, it steals the item off a Pokemon it hits with an attack. Does not affect Doom Desire and Future Sight. If multiple targets are hit by an attack the item is stolen from the fastest Pokemon, while considering the effect of Trick Room and prioritizing opposing Pokemon before allies.

magmaarmor.shortDescJa: This Pokemon cannot be frozen. Gaining this Ability while frozen cures it.
magmaarmor.descJa: This Pokemon cannot be frozen. Gaining this Ability while frozen cures it.

magnetpull.shortDescJa: Prevents opposing Steel-type Pokemon from choosing to switch out.
magnetpull.descJa: Prevents opposing Steel-type Pokemon from choosing to switch out, unless they are holding a Shed Shell or are a Ghost type.

marvelscale.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon has a non-volatile status condition, its Defense is multiplied by 1.5.
marvelscale.descJa: If this Pokemon has a non-volatile status condition, its Defense is multiplied by 1.5.

megalauncher.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's pulse moves have 1.5x power. Heal Pulse heals 3/4 target's max HP.
megalauncher.descJa: This Pokemon's pulse moves have their power multiplied by 1.5. Heal Pulse restores 3/4 of a target's maximum HP, rounded half down.

megasol.shortDescJa: このポケモンの技は、サニーデイの効果が発動したかのように使用されます。
megasol.descJa: このポケモンの技は、サニーデイの効果が発動したかのように使用されます。

merciless.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's attacks are critical hits if the target is poisoned.
merciless.descJa: This Pokemon's attacks are critical hits if the target is poisoned.

mimicry.shortDescJa: このポケモンは地形に合わせてタイプが変化する。 Terrain が終了するとタイプが元に戻ります。
mimicry.descJa: このポケモンがこの能力を獲得したとき、または地形が始まるたびに、このポケモンのタイプはアクティブな地形に一致するように変わります。電気地形では電気タイプ、草地では草タイプ、霧地形ではフェアリータイプ、サイキック地形ではサイキックタイプになります。アクティブな地形なしでこの能力を取得した場合、または地形が終了した場合、このポケモンのタイプはその種族の元のタイプになります。

mindseye.shortDescJa: Fighting, Normal moves hit Ghost. Accuracy can't be lowered, ignores evasiveness.
mindseye.descJa: This Pokemon can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's accuracy stat stage. This Pokemon ignores a target's evasiveness stat stage.

minus.shortDescJa: If an active ally has this Ability or the Plus Ability, this Pokemon's Sp. Atk is 1.5x.
minus.descJa: 味方がこの能力かプラス能力を持っている場合、このポケモンの特攻は1.5倍になる。

mirrorarmor.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon's stat stages would be lowered, the attacker's are lowered instead.
mirrorarmor.descJa: When one of this Pokemon's stat stages would be lowered by another Pokemon, that Pokemon's stat stage is lowered instead. This effect does not happen if this Pokemon's stat stage was already -6. If the other Pokemon has a substitute, neither Pokemon has its stat stage lowered.

mistysurge.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Misty Terrain.
mistysurge.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Misty Terrain.

moldbreaker.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's moves and their effects ignore the Abilities of other Pokemon.
moldbreaker.descJa: This Pokemon's moves and their effects ignore certain Abilities of other Pokemon. The Abilities that can be negated are Armor Tail, Aroma Veil, Aura Break, Battle Armor, Big Pecks, Bulletproof, Clear Body, Contrary, Damp, Dazzling, Disguise, Dry Skin, Earth Eater, Filter, Flash Fire, Flower Gift, Flower Veil, Fluffy, Friend Guard, Fur Coat, Good as Gold, Grass Pelt, Guard Dog, Heatproof, Heavy Metal, Hyper Cutter, Ice Face, Ice Scales, Illuminate, Immunity, Inner Focus, Insomnia, Keen Eye, Leaf Guard, Levitate, Light Metal, Lightning Rod, Limber, Magic Bounce, Magma Armor, Marvel Scale, Mind's Eye, Mirror Armor, Motor Drive, Multiscale, Oblivious, Overcoat, Own Tempo, Pastel Veil, Punk Rock, Purifying Salt, Queenly Majesty, Sand Veil, Sap Sipper, Shell Armor, Shield Dust, Simple, Snow Cloak, Solid Rock, Soundproof, Sticky Hold, Storm Drain, Sturdy, Suction Cups, Sweet Veil, Tangled Feet, Telepathy, Tera Shell, Thermal Exchange, Thick Fat, Unaware, Vital Spirit, Volt Absorb, Water Absorb, Water Bubble, Water Veil, Well-Baked Body, White Smoke, Wind Rider, Wonder Guard, and Wonder Skin. This affects every other Pokemon on the field, whether or not it is a target of this Pokemon's move, and whether or not their Ability is beneficial to this Pokemon.

moody.shortDescJa: Boosts a random stat (except accuracy/evasion) +2 and another stat -1 every turn.
moody.descJa: This Pokemon has a random stat, other than accuracy or evasiveness, raised by 2 stages and another stat lowered by 1 stage at the end of each turn.

motordrive.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Speed is raised 1 stage if hit by an Electric move; Electric immunity.
motordrive.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to Electric-type moves and raises its Speed by 1 stage when hit by an Electric-type move.

moxie.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and KOes another Pokemon.
moxie.descJa: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and knocks out another Pokemon.

multiscale.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon is at full HP, damage taken from attacks is halved.
multiscale.descJa: If this Pokemon is at full HP, damage taken from attacks is halved.

multitype.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon is an Arceus, its type changes to match its held Plate.
multitype.descJa: If this Pokemon is an Arceus, its type changes to match its held Plate.

mummy.shortDescJa: このポケモンと接触したポケモンは能力が「ミイラ」に変化します。
mummy.descJa: このポケモンと接触したポケモンは能力が「ミイラ」に変化します。アズワン、バトルボンド、昏睡、変装、ガルプミサイル、アイスフェイス、マルチタイプ、ミイラ、パワーコンストラクト、RKSシステム、スクーリング、シールドダウン、スタンスチェンジ、テラシフト、ゼンモード、またはゼロからヒーローの能力を持つポケモンには影響しません。

myceliummight.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Status moves go last in their priority bracket and ignore Abilities.
myceliummight.descJa: This Pokemon's Status moves ignore certain Abilities of other Pokemon, and go last among Pokemon using the same or greater priority moves.

naturalcure.shortDescJa: This Pokemon has its non-volatile status condition cured when it switches out.
naturalcure.descJa: This Pokemon has its non-volatile status condition cured when it switches out.

neuroforce.shortDescJa: このポケモンの特効ワザは対象に1.25倍のダメージを与える。
neuroforce.descJa: 対象に対して非常に効果的なこのポケモンのワザのダメージは1.25倍になる。

neutralizinggas.shortDescJa: While this Pokemon is active, Abilities have no effect.
neutralizinggas.descJa: While this Pokemon is active, Abilities have no effect. This Ability activates before hazards and other Abilities take effect. Does not affect the As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero Abilities.

noguard.shortDescJa: Every move used by or against this Pokemon will always hit.
noguard.descJa: Every move used by or against this Pokemon will always hit.

normalize.shortDescJa: このポケモンの技はノーマルタイプに変化し、威力が1.2倍になる。
normalize.descJa: このポケモンの技はノーマルタイプに変化し、威力が1.2倍になる。この効果は、技のタイプを変更する他の効果よりも先に適用されます。

oblivious.shortDescJa: This Pokemon cannot be infatuated or taunted. Immune to Intimidate.
oblivious.descJa: このポケモンは夢中になったり挑発したりすることができません。夢中または挑発されているときにこの能力を獲得すると、それが治ります。このポケモンは威嚇能力の影響を受けません。

opportunist.shortDescJa: When an opposing Pokemon has a stat stage raised, this Pokemon copies the effect.
opportunist.descJa: When an opposing Pokemon has a stat stage raised, this Pokemon copies the effect.

orichalcumpulse.shortDescJa: On switch-in, summons Sunny Day. During Sunny Day, Attack is 1.3333x.
orichalcumpulse.descJa: On switch-in, summons Sunny Day. During Sunny Day, Attack is 1.3333x.

overcoat.shortDescJa: This Pokemon is immune to powder moves, Sandstorm damage, and Effect Spore.
overcoat.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to powder moves, damage from Sandstorm, and the effects of Rage Powder and the Effect Spore Ability.

overgrow.shortDescJa: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Grass attacks.
overgrow.descJa: When this Pokemon has 1/3 or less of its maximum HP, rounded down, its offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Grass-type attack.

owntempo.shortDescJa: This Pokemon cannot be confused. Immune to Intimidate.
owntempo.descJa: This Pokemon cannot be confused. Gaining this Ability while confused cures it. This Pokemon is immune to the effect of the Intimidate Ability.

parentalbond.shortDescJa: このポケモンのダメージ技は2回ヒットする。 2回目の攻撃ではダメージが4分の1になります。
parentalbond.descJa: このポケモンのダメージ技は2回ヒットする多段ヒット技になる。 2回目の攻撃ではダメージが4分の1になります。ドゥーム デザイア、ドラゴン ダーツ、ダイマックス キャノン、エンデバー、エクスプロージョン、ファイナル ギャンビット、フリング、フューチャー サイト、アイス ボール、ロールアウト、セルフ デストラクト、マルチヒット ムーブ、複数のターゲットを持つムーブ、または 2 ターンのムーブには影響しません。

pastelveil.shortDescJa: このポケモンとその仲間は毒状態にならない。スイッチインすると、毒状態の味方を治療します。
pastelveil.descJa: このポケモンとその仲間は毒状態にならない。このポケモンまたはその仲間が毒状態にあるときにこの能力を得ることで、そのポケモンを治すことができます。毒を引き起こす効果中にこの能力が無視されている場合、このポケモンはすぐに治りますが、味方は治りません。

perishbody.shortDescJa: このポケモンと接触すると、そのポケモンと攻撃者に「滅びの歌」効果が開始されます。
perishbody.descJa: このポケモンと接触すると、そのポケモンと攻撃者に「滅びの歌」効果が開始されます。攻撃側がすでに消滅カウントを持っている場合、このポケモンにはこの効果は発生しません。

pickpocket.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon has no item and is hit by a contact move, it steals the attacker's item.
pickpocket.descJa: If this Pokemon has no item and is hit by a contact move, it steals the attacker's item. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability.

pickup.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon has no item, it finds one used by an adjacent Pokemon this turn.
pickup.descJa: At the end of each turn, if this Pokemon is not holding an item and at least one adjacent Pokemon used an item during this turn, one of those Pokemon is selected at random and this Pokemon obtains that Pokemon's last used item. An item is not considered the last used if it was a popped Air Balloon, if the item was picked up by another Pokemon with this Ability, or if the item was lost to Bug Bite, Corrosive Gas, Covet, Incinerate, Knock Off, Pluck, or Thief. Items thrown with Fling can be picked up.

piercingdrill.shortDescJa: このポケモンの接触技は対象の守りを無視し、通常の1/4のダメージを与える。
piercingdrill.descJa: このポケモンの接触技は対象の守りを無視し、通常の1/4のダメージを与える。

pixilate.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Fairy type and have 1.2x power.
pixilate.descJa: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.

plus.shortDescJa: If an active ally has this Ability or the Minus Ability, this Pokemon's Sp. Atk is 1.5x.
plus.descJa: If an active ally has this Ability or the Minus Ability, this Pokemon's Special Attack is multiplied by 1.5.

poisonheal.shortDescJa: This Pokemon is healed by 1/8 of its max HP each turn when poisoned; no HP loss.
poisonheal.descJa: このポケモンがどく状態にある場合、HPが減る代わりにターン終了時に最大HPの1/8（切り捨て）が回復する。

poisonpoint.shortDescJa: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be poisoned.
poisonpoint.descJa: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be poisoned.

poisonpuppeteer.shortDescJa: ペシャルント: このポケモンが対象を毒状態にすると、対象も混乱状態になる。
poisonpuppeteer.descJa: このポケモンがペシャルントで、ターゲットを毒またはひどい毒にすると、ターゲットも混乱状態になります。

poisontouch.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning.
poisontouch.descJa: This Pokemon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning. This effect comes after a move's inherent secondary effect chance.

powerconstruct.shortDescJa: ジガルデの場合10%/50%、ターン終了時に最大HPが1/2以下の場合コンプリートに変化。
powerconstruct.descJa: このポケモンが10％または50％フォルムのジガルデの場合、ターン終了時のHPが最大の1/2以下になるとコンプリートフォルムに変化する。

powerofalchemy.shortDescJa: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints.
powerofalchemy.descJa: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints. Abilities that cannot be copied are As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, and Zero to Hero.

powerspot.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's allies have the power of their moves multiplied by 1.3.
powerspot.descJa: This Pokemon's allies have the power of their moves multiplied by 1.3. This affects Doom Desire and Future Sight, even if the user is not on the field.

prankster.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Status moves have priority raised by 1, but Dark types are immune.
prankster.descJa: This Pokemon's non-damaging moves have their priority increased by 1. Opposing Dark-type Pokemon are immune to these moves, and any move called by these moves, if the resulting user of the move has this Ability.

pressure.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon is the target of a foe's move, that move loses one additional PP.
pressure.descJa: If this Pokemon is the target of an opposing Pokemon's move, that move loses one additional PP. Imprison, Snatch, and Tera Blast also lose one additional PP when used by an opposing Pokemon, but Sticky Web does not.

primordialsea.shortDescJa: スイッチを入れると、このアビリティが戦闘でアクティブでなくなるまで激しい雨が降り始めます。
primordialsea.descJa: スイッチインすると、天気は原初の海になり、レインダンスのすべての効果が含まれ、ダメージを与える火タイプの動きが実行されなくなります。この天候は、この能力がどのポケモンに対しても有効でなくなるまで、またはデルタストリームまたは荒れ果てた土地の能力によって天気が変更されるまで、効果が続きます。

prismarmor.shortDescJa: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.
prismarmor.descJa: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.

propellertail.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's moves cannot be redirected to a different target by any effect.
propellertail.descJa: This Pokemon's moves cannot be redirected to a different target by any effect.

protean.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's type changes to the type of the move it is using. Once per switch-in.
protean.descJa: This Pokemon's type changes to match the type of the move it is about to use. This effect comes after all effects that change a move's type. This effect can only happen once per switch-in, and only if this Pokemon is not Terastallized.

protosynthesis.shortDescJa: Sunny Day active or Booster Energy used: highest stat is 1.3x, or 1.5x if Speed.
protosynthesis.descJa: If Sunny Day is active or this Pokemon uses a held Booster Energy, this Pokemon's highest stat is multiplied by 1.3, or by 1.5 if the highest stat is Speed. Stat stage changes are considered at the time this Ability activates. If multiple stats are tied, Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed are prioritized in that order. If this effect was started by Sunny Day, a held Booster Energy will not activate and the effect ends when Sunny Day is no longer active. If this effect was started by a held Booster Energy, it ends when this Pokemon is no longer active.

psychicsurge.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Psychic Terrain.
psychicsurge.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Psychic Terrain.

punkrock.shortDescJa: This Pokemon receives 1/2 damage from sound moves. Its own have 1.3x power.
punkrock.descJa: This Pokemon's sound-based moves have their power multiplied by 1.3. This Pokemon takes halved damage from sound-based moves.

purifyingsalt.shortDescJa: Ghost damage to this Pokemon dealt with a halved offensive stat; can't be statused.
purifyingsalt.descJa: このポケモンは不揮発性の状態異常やあくびの影響を受けない。ポケモンがこのポケモンに対してゴーストタイプの技を使った場合、そのポケモンの攻撃力はこのポケモンへのダメージ計算時に半分になる。

quarkdrive.shortDescJa: Electric Terrain active or Booster Energy used: highest stat is 1.3x, or 1.5x if Speed.
quarkdrive.descJa: If Electric Terrain is active or this Pokemon uses a held Booster Energy, this Pokemon's highest stat is multiplied by 1.3, or by 1.5 if the highest stat is Speed. Stat stage changes are considered at the time this Ability activates. If multiple stats are tied, Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed are prioritized in that order. If this effect was started by Electric Terrain, a held Booster Energy will not activate and the effect ends when Electric Terrain is no longer active. If this effect was started by a held Booster Energy, it ends when this Pokemon is no longer active.

queenlymajesty.shortDescJa: This Pokemon and its allies are protected from opposing priority moves.
queenlymajesty.descJa: Priority moves used by opposing Pokemon targeting this Pokemon or its allies are prevented from having an effect.

quickdraw.shortDescJa: This Pokemon has a 30% chance to move first in its priority bracket with attacking moves.
quickdraw.descJa: This Pokemon has a 30% chance to move first in its priority bracket with attacking moves.

quickfeet.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon is statused, its Speed is 1.5x; ignores Speed drop from paralysis.
quickfeet.descJa: If this Pokemon has a non-volatile status condition, its Speed is multiplied by 1.5. This Pokemon ignores the paralysis effect of halving Speed.

raindish.shortDescJa: If Rain Dance is active, this Pokemon heals 1/16 of its max HP each turn.
raindish.descJa: If Rain Dance is active, this Pokemon restores 1/16 of its maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn. This effect is prevented if this Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella.

rattled.shortDescJa: Speed is raised 1 stage if hit by a Bug-, Dark-, or Ghost-type attack, or Intimidated.
rattled.descJa: This Pokemon's Speed is raised by 1 stage if hit by a Bug-, Dark-, or Ghost-type attack, or if an opposing Pokemon affected this Pokemon with the Intimidate Ability.

receiver.shortDescJa: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints.
receiver.descJa: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints. Abilities that cannot be copied are As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, and Zero to Hero.

reckless.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's attacks with recoil or crash damage have 1.2x power; not Struggle.
reckless.descJa: This Pokemon's attacks with recoil or crash damage have their power multiplied by 1.2. Does not affect Struggle.

refrigerate.shortDescJa: このポケモンのノーマルタイプの技がこおりタイプになり、威力が1.2倍になる。
refrigerate.descJa: このポケモンのノーマルタイプの技はこおりタイプの技になり、威力が1.2倍になる。この効果は、技のタイプを変更する他の効果の後、イオン デリュージとエレクトリファイの効果の前に発生します。

regenerator.shortDescJa: This Pokemon restores 1/3 of its maximum HP, rounded down, when it switches out.
regenerator.descJa: This Pokemon restores 1/3 of its maximum HP, rounded down, when it switches out.

ripen.shortDescJa: When this Pokemon eats certain Berries, the effects are doubled.
ripen.descJa: When this Pokemon eats certain Berries, the effects are doubled. Berries that restore HP or PP have the amount doubled, Berries that raise stat stages have the amount doubled, Berries that halve damage taken quarter it instead, and a Jaboca Berry or Rowap Berry has the attacker lose 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down.

rivalry.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's attacks do 1.25x on same gender targets; 0.75x on opposite gender.
rivalry.descJa: This Pokemon's attacks have their power multiplied by 1.25 against targets of the same gender or multiplied by 0.75 against targets of the opposite gender. There is no modifier if either this Pokemon or the target is genderless.

rkssystem.shortDescJa: このポケモンがシルヴァリーの場合、持っているメモリーに合わせてタイプが変わる。
rkssystem.descJa: このポケモンがシルヴァリーの場合、持っているメモリーに合わせてタイプが変わる。

rockhead.shortDescJa: This Pokemon does not take recoil damage besides Struggle/Life Orb/crash damage.
rockhead.descJa: This Pokemon does not take recoil damage, except Struggle. Does not affect Life Orb damage or crash damage.

rockypayload.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Rock-type attack.
rockypayload.descJa: This Pokemon's offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Rock-type attack.

roughskin.shortDescJa: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon lose 1/8 of their max HP.
roughskin.descJa: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon lose 1/8 of their maximum HP, rounded down.

sandforce.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Ground/Rock/Steel attacks do 1.3x in Sandstorm; immunity to it.
sandforce.descJa: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's Ground-, Rock-, and Steel-type attacks have their power multiplied by 1.3. This Pokemon takes no damage from Sandstorm.

sandrush.shortDescJa: 砂嵐がアクティブな場合、このポケモンのスピードは2倍になります。砂嵐に対する耐性。
sandrush.descJa: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled. This Pokemon takes no damage from Sandstorm.

sandspit.shortDescJa: When this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the effect of Sandstorm begins.
sandspit.descJa: When this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the effect of Sandstorm begins.

sandstream.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Sandstorm.
sandstream.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Sandstorm.

sandveil.shortDescJa: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's evasiveness is 1.25x; immunity to Sandstorm.
sandveil.descJa: If Sandstorm is active, the accuracy of moves used against this Pokemon is multiplied by 0.8. This Pokemon takes no damage from Sandstorm.

sapsipper.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's Attack is raised 1 stage if hit by a Grass move; Grass immunity.
sapsipper.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to Grass-type moves and raises its Attack by 1 stage when hit by a Grass-type move.

schooling.shortDescJa: ユーザーがウィシワシの場合、最大HPが1/4を超える場合はスクールフォームに変更され、それ以外の場合はソロフォームに変更されます。
schooling.descJa: スイッチイン時、このポケモンがレベル20以上で最大HPの1/4以上残っているウィシワシの場合、スクールフォルムに変化する。スクール形態でHPが最大HPの1/4以下になるとターン終了時にソロ形態に変化する。ソロフォームでターン終了時のHPが最大HPの1/4以上の場合、スクールフォームに変化する。

scrappy.shortDescJa: Fighting, Normal moves hit Ghost. Immune to Intimidate.
scrappy.descJa: This Pokemon can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. This Pokemon is immune to the effect of the Intimidate Ability.

screencleaner.shortDescJa: スイッチインすると、オーロラベール、ライトスクリーン、リフレクトの効果が両面で終了します。
screencleaner.descJa: スイッチインすると、オーロラベール、ライトスクリーン、リフレクトの効果が両面で終了します。

seedsower.shortDescJa: When this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the effect of Grassy Terrain begins.
seedsower.descJa: When this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the effect of Grassy Terrain begins.

serenegrace.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's moves have their secondary effect chance doubled.
serenegrace.descJa: This Pokemon's moves have their secondary effect chance doubled. This effect stacks with the Rainbow effect, except for secondary effects that cause the target to flinch.

shadowshield.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon is at full HP, damage taken from attacks is halved.
shadowshield.descJa: If this Pokemon is at full HP, damage taken from attacks is halved.

shadowtag.shortDescJa: Prevents foes from choosing to switch unless they also have this Ability.
shadowtag.descJa: Prevents opposing Pokemon from choosing to switch out, unless they are holding a Shed Shell, are a Ghost type, or also have this Ability.

sharpness.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's slicing moves have their power multiplied by 1.5.
sharpness.descJa: This Pokemon's slicing moves have their power multiplied by 1.5.

shedskin.shortDescJa: This Pokemon has a 33% chance to have its status cured at the end of each turn.
shedskin.descJa: This Pokemon has a 33% chance to have its non-volatile status condition cured at the end of each turn.

sheerforce.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's attacks with secondary effects have 1.3x power; nullifies the effects.
sheerforce.descJa: This Pokemon's attacks with secondary effects have their power multiplied by 1.3, but the secondary effects are removed. If a secondary effect was removed, it also removes the user's Life Orb recoil and Shell Bell recovery, and prevents the target's Anger Shell, Berserk, Color Change, Emergency Exit, Pickpocket, Wimp Out, Red Card, Eject Button, Kee Berry, and Maranga Berry from activating.

shellarmor.shortDescJa: This Pokemon cannot be struck by a critical hit.
shellarmor.descJa: This Pokemon cannot be struck by a critical hit.

shielddust.shortDescJa: This Pokemon is not affected by the secondary effect of another Pokemon's attack.
shielddust.descJa: This Pokemon is not affected by the secondary effect of another Pokemon's attack. Attacks with secondary effects that are prevented include those with a chance (even 100%) to paralyze, sleep, freeze, burn, poison, confuse, cause this Pokemon to flinch, cause this Pokemon's stat stages to be lowered, as well as Anchor Shot, Eerie Spell, Fling, Psychic Noise, Salt Cure, Spirit Shackle, Syrup Bomb, and Throat Chop. The effect of Sparkling Aria is prevented if this Pokemon is the only target. Secondary effects added by King's Rock, Razor Fang, and the Poison Touch, Stench, and Toxic Chain Abilities are also prevented against this Pokemon.

shieldsdown.shortDescJa: ミニオールの場合、スイッチイン/ターン終了時に最大HPの1/2以下でコアに変化し、それ以外の場合はメテオに変化します。
shieldsdown.descJa: If this Pokemon is a Minior, it changes to its Core forme if it has 1/2 or less of its maximum HP, and changes to Meteor Form if it has more than 1/2 its maximum HP. This check is done on switch-in and at the end of each turn. While in its Meteor Form, it cannot become affected by a non-volatile status condition or Yawn.

simple.shortDescJa: When one of this Pokemon's stat stages is raised or lowered, the amount is doubled.
simple.descJa: When one of this Pokemon's stat stages is raised or lowered, the amount is doubled.

skilllink.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's multi-hit attacks always hit the maximum number of times.
skilllink.descJa: This Pokemon's multi-hit attacks always hit the maximum number of times. Triple Kick and Triple Axel do not check accuracy for the second and third hits.

slowstart.shortDescJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon's Attack and Speed are halved for 5 turns.
slowstart.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon's Attack and Speed are halved for 5 turns.

slushrush.shortDescJa: If Snow is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.
slushrush.descJa: If Snow is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.

sniper.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon strikes with a critical hit, the damage is multiplied by 1.5.
sniper.descJa: If this Pokemon strikes with a critical hit, the damage is multiplied by 1.5.

steelworker.shortDescJa: このポケモンの攻撃ステータスは、スチールタイプの攻撃で1.5倍になります。

stormdrain.shortDescJa: This Pokemon draws Water moves to itself to raise Sp. Atk by 1; Water immunity.
stormdrain.descJa: This Pokemon is immune to Water-type moves and raises its Special Attack by 1 stage when hit by a Water-type move. If this Pokemon is not the target of a single-target Water-type move used by another Pokemon, this Pokemon redirects that move to itself if it is within the range of that move. If multiple Pokemon could redirect with this Ability, it goes to the one with the highest Speed, or in the case of a tie to the one that has had this Ability active longer.

strongjaw.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's bite-based attacks have 1.5x power. Bug Bite is not boosted.
strongjaw.descJa: This Pokemon's bite-based attacks have their power multiplied by 1.5.

sturdy.shortDescJa: If this Pokemon is at full HP, it survives one hit with at least 1 HP. Immune to OHKO.
sturdy.descJa: If this Pokemon is at full HP, it survives one hit with at least 1 HP. OHKO moves fail when used against this Pokemon.

suctioncups.shortDescJa: This Pokemon cannot be forced to switch out by another Pokemon's attack or item.
suctioncups.descJa: This Pokemon cannot be forced to switch out by another Pokemon's attack or item.

superluck.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's critical hit ratio is raised by 1 stage.

supersweetsyrup.descJa: On switch-in, this Pokemon lowers the evasiveness of opponents 1 stage. Once per battle.

supremeoverlord.shortDescJa: This Pokemon's moves have 10% more power for each fainted ally, up to 5 allies.
supremeoverlord.descJa: This Pokemon's moves have their power multiplied by 1+(X*0.1), where X is the total number of times any Pokemon has fainted on the user's side when this Ability became active, and X cannot be greater than 5.

surgesurfer.shortDescJa: If Electric Terrain is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.

sweetveil.descJa: This Pokemon and its allies cannot fall asleep, but those already asleep do not wake up immediately. This Pokemon and its allies cannot use Rest successfully or become affected by Yawn, and those previously affected will not fall asleep.

swiftswim.shortDescJa: レインダンスが発動している場合、このポケモンの素早さは2倍になる。

synchronize.shortDescJa: If another Pokemon burns/poisons/paralyzes this Pokemon, it also gets that status.
synchronize.descJa: If another Pokemon burns, paralyzes, poisons, or badly poisons this Pokemon, that Pokemon receives the same non-volatile status condition.
